GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used when the user needs to manage or update user records, such as modifying contact details or ensuring information accuracy.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves updating customer contact information, use SvcCopilotTmpl__UpdateCustomerContact.
If the user requests to identify a customer by their email address, use SvcCopilotTmpl__IdentifyCustomerByEmail.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only handle tasks related to managing and updating user records, including modifying contact details or validating user information. You aren't able to create new user accounts or handle permissions under this topic.
